notes: major bug|fixconfig.py: model matrix now caches to disk, cold starts skip Ollama query|config.py: added LOGS_DIR, CHAT_HISTORY, SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS constants|main.py: logging now writes to logs/legion.log on disk|main.py: all 5 role models pre-warmed in parallel on startup|main.py: failed builds saved to logs/failed_builds.jsonl|main.py: workspace scanner now supports .py .js .html .css .json .ts .txt .md|main.py: import error check added as separate validation stage|main.py: edit path has timeout guards so GUI never freezes|agents/chat.py: chat memory now persists to disk between sessions|agents/chat.py: last 4 turns restored from disk on startup|agents/chat.py: clear_history() wipes both memory and disk log|gui.py: file tree panel added showing all workspace files|gui.py: Ollama connection status dot added to header|gui.py: build path now shows diff before promoting|gui.py: Clear History button added to chat tab|gui.py: edit uses tree-selected file directly without dialog
